rows.notes: Consensus across extractors. Visually verified. The arithmetic check provided by gemini-flash confirms the total: (21+10+19+9) = 59 pounds; (6+18+3+16) = 43 shillings + 1 (from 21 pence) = 44 shillings (2 pounds 4 shillings); (3+4+8+6) = 21 pence (1 shilling 9 pence). Total: (59+2) pounds, 4 shillings, 9 pence = 61.4.9.
rows.section_header: 1806 Messrs. T. Biddulph, Cocks, Ridge & Co.

rows.description: Carried to Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and row type. Description from gemini-flash is accurate. Arithmetic check confirms the total: 2.15.10 + 1.6.6 = 4.2.4 (10d + 6d = 16d = 1s 4d; 15s + 6s + 1s = 22s = 1£ 2s; 2£ + 1£ + 1£ = 4£). This arithmetic check significantly boosts confidence in the values.
rows.section_header: at the Bank
